name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: You Still Have Time
body:
Invest today to help build your future of faith in 2017!

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

2016 was just the beginning of a movement of
faith to restore Biblical values to the heart of this great
nation.

But you only have hours left before midnight,
the time your gift must be received to be tax deductible in 2016.
Your gift will help My Faith Votes begin 2017 on solid footing
for the work we have to do for God's Kingdom.

Give now to ensure your faith pays dividends
in 2017 for your children and grandchildren!

Thank you for joining in fighting together
for our future of faith.

Jason Yates, CEO
My Faith Votes

name: Donna Brazile
subject: One quick thing
body:
We're counting on Democrats to keep fighting
---
**This year is coming to an end, and we need to know you're committed to fighting back against the GOP and the Trump administration. Will you donate before our deadline at midnight?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c125/4067b0a/228ae1400/7e794b18/1304063895/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20161231_db_nd&source=em_20161231_db_nd")**
I'll keep this brief.

Donald Trump has already shown that his administration will flout the Constitution, the rule of law, basic principles of ethics, and common sense -- and he hasn't even taken office yet.

If he thinks we're going to sit back and let him do it, then he's got another thing coming.

But in order to hold Donald Trump accountable every day he's in office, our party needs to be at full strength on Day One.

So I'm coming to you again, one last time in 2016, to ask you to chip in $3 or more to support Democrats. This end-of-year deadline couldn't be more important.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Forming the resistance
body:
We will defend the rights of those who will be most vulnerable during Trump's presidency.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
If Donald Trump had his way, he'd make discrimination the law of the land.
During his campaign he supported banning all Muslims from entering the U.S., and last week he defended his plan to create a national registry of Muslims who live here.
Trump has said he wants to deport millions of undocumented immigrants who call this country home. And he plans to reverse President Obama's executive action that provides relief for people like me who were brought to the U.S. as children.
Trump also wants to expand the use of stop-and-frisk, a practice that is essentially an open invitation for police officers to racially profile people of color.
**We must do everything we can to protect communities that will be targeted by the racist and xenophobic Trump administration. That's why one of Our Revolution's top priorities in 2017 will be defending the rights of those who will be most vulnerable during Trump's presidency.**
[**Will you make a $3 contribution before tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline to support Our Revolution's work protecting immigrants, Muslims, and anyone else who becomes a target under Trump?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full")
Our Revolution will be working at the state and local level to implement policies to keep immigrant families together, establish fair policing practices and allow all people to feel safe in their communities.
When Trump tries to divide us and force millions of our sisters and brothers to live in fear, it will be up to us to stand up for and defend the rights of those who will be harmed by the policies of his administration.
Sanctuary cities and states - places that protect undocumented immigrants from deportation - will be a central focus of our work. By working with grassroots organizations, we will ensure the existing protections granted by sanctuaries are kept in place while adopting those same protections in other cities and states across the country.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution right now, ahead of tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline, to help Our Revolution form the resistance movement against Trump?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full")
**Every contribution we receive will send a powerful message that our movement is prepared to fight back against Trump's destructive plans for our country.**
Thank you for adding yours before tonight's midnight deadline.
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Political Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231-full")**

name: Florida Democrats
subject: we need to hear from you before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Before you start your New Years celebrations, we need to hear from you | This is it, team.

Our FINAL FEC deadline of 2016 is midnight tonight, and this is our first chance to show Donald Trump (while he's angerly tweeting his way to Washington from Florida) Democrats will be putting up a fight in 2017 from the moment he is sworn into office.

name: deadline-alert@dscc.org
subject: On Trump's CHOPPING block:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Each day brings news of another program on the Trump chopping block in 2017. Democrats everywhere must unite if we want to save them, and protect our progress. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161231-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Tonight is a turning point, Friend.

Your grassroots dedication scored Democrats major victories in 2016 - from sending extremists like Kelly Ayotte and Mark Kirk packing to electing a RECORD number of women to the Senate.

But we can't let that blind us from what's happening right now in Trump Tower: Donald and his Republicans are putting the final touches on a frightening right-wing agenda for 2017. And come January 20, they'll hit the ground running.

That's why we're ending 2016 by launching a new membership card that makes it clear Democrats will fight back EVERY STEP of the way. [**But our updated records show you haven 't activated your membership yet, Friend. And you're almost out of time to get on board!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161231-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161231-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Friend, each day brings news of another program going to the Trump and McConnell chopping block - essentials like Obamacare, Social Security, and Medicare are ALL at risk.

Democrats must unite NOW to save these programs, protect President Obama's legacy, and fight for our values. _But it simply won 't happen without you -- and 2017 is just HOURS away!_

[**If you make a grassroots gift of ANY amount before the ball drops, we 'll automatically activate your membership for 2017 - and send you your personalized DSCC card (shipping included!).**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161231-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Happy New Year,
Team DSCC

P.S. If you've contributed to get your 2017 membership card over the last few days, your generous gift may still be processing. We're so grateful for your support!

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161231-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed7d/2b07114c/41e51467/73681272/3885471776/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed7d/2b07114c/41e51467/7368126d/3885471776/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed7d/2b07114c/41e51467/7368126c/3885471776/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

More than half of Senate Democrats are facing reelection, and Washington Republicans are already working to clear the way for their corporate special interest agenda.

name: Team Russ
subject: Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin need your help
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Russ is standing with Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin. Will you? | Friend, Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin are both up for re-election in 2018, and you can bet that Donald Trump and his cronies are going to attack them with all they have. **We have to fight back. Not only are Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin instrumental the fight against Trump's dangerous agenda: They're champions for middle and working-class families. We desperately need their voices in the Senate.** [**Stand with Russ and support two progressive champions in the Senate: Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin. Donate $5 before the clock strikes midnight.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b85/4222153698/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warrenbaldwin18?utm_source=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&refcode=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&utm_campaign=EWTB-RS&utm_medium=ema") \- Team Russ \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Thursday, December 29
Subject: Our strongest defense starts in the Senate [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b85/4222153698/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warrenbaldwin18?utm_source=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&refcode=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&utm_campaign=EWTB-RS&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We're facing the end of 2016, which undoubtedly will go down as one of the roughest years in recent memory for progressives like you and me. Right now, the progressive movement faces a big question: Will we stand up to Trump and fight for our values? Or will we let fear get the best of us and back down from the looming fight? I know where I stand: I'm going to do everything I can to fight back against president-elect Donald Trump and his terrifying vision for the future of our country. **I can think of no better way to show him that than by supporting two of the Senate's key progressives who are up for election in 20 18: Tammy Baldwin and Elizabeth Warren.** **[Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin are ramping up their campaigns, and they need you in their corner. Donate $5 before midnight on Saturday and help them reach their end-of-year goals.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b85/4222153698/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warrenbaldwin18?utm_source=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&refcode=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&utm_campaign=EWTB-RS&utm_medium=ema")** Tammy Baldwin was one of my biggest supporters and teammates -- she campaigned for me and Democrats up and down the ticket across Wisconsin throughout 2016\. And during her time in the Senate, she's fought to make sure millionaires and billionaires pay their share in taxes. She's worked tirelessly for commonsense laws to protect American workers, even in the face of extreme Republican obstruction. And Elizabeth Warren joined me on the campaign trail countless times. But, most importantly, she never backed down from challenging Trump at every turn and held him accountable for his hateful language and demagoguery. She's a lifelong champion for working families, and you can trust she'll continue to lead the fight to rein in Wall Street. There's absolutely no question: We need to have her back. **The strongest defense against Trump's administration starts with the Senate. Senators Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin are up for reelection in 20 18, and we cannot afford to lose their voices. The future of our country is on the line.** **[Show Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin you're not done fighting yet. Donate $5 to their campaigns before midnight on Saturday to make sure they reach their end-of-year goals.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b85/4222153698/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warrenbaldwin18?utm_source=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&refcode=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&utm_campaign=EWTB-RS&utm_medium=ema")** We progressives are on the front line of the fight to protect our country from Trump. As my friends and allies, Elizabeth Warren and Tammy Baldwin, ramp up their campaigns for Senate, I hope you'll join me in standing with them. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b85/4222153698/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warrenbaldwin18?utm_source=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&refcode=ema_2016-12-31_EWTB-RS_ND&utm_campaign=EWTB-RS&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b82/4222153698/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46ae/1c469400/2aabd08/3546b83/4222153698/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Taking on Trump
body:
If Donald Trump had his way, he'd make discrimination the law of the land.
Sisters and Brothers -
We wanted to make sure you saw Erika's message from earlier about our plan to defend the rights of communities who will be vulnerable during Trump's presidency, including immigrants, Muslims and people of color.
You can read more about the plan below, but first [**we hope you'll add a $3 contribution before tonight's FEC fundraising deadline to support Our Revolution's work protecting those who will become targets of the Trump administration.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full")**
Taking on Trump will require all of us coming together to fight back. Thank you for chipping in before tonight's deadline.
\- The team at Our Revolution
* * *

[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full")

Sisters and Brothers -
If Donald Trump had his way, he'd make discrimination the law of the land.
During his campaign he supported banning all Muslims from entering the U.S., and last week he defended his plan to create a national registry of Muslims who live here.
Trump has said he wants to deport millions of undocumented immigrants who call this country home. He plans to reverse President Obama's executive action that provides relief for people like me who were brought to the U.S. as children.
Trump also wants to expand the use of stop-and-frisk, a practice that is essentially an open invitation for police officers to racially profile people of color.
**We must do everything we can to protect communities that will be targeted by the racist and xenophobic Trump administration. That's why one of Our Revolution's top priorities in 2017 will be defending the rights of those who will be most vulnerable during Trump's presidency.**
[**Will you make a $3 contribution before tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline to support Our Revolution's work protecting immigrants, Muslims, and anyone else who becomes a target under Trump?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full")
Our Revolution will be working at the state and local level to implement policies to keep immigrant families together, establish fair policing practices and allow all people to feel safe in their communities.
When Trump tries to divide us and force millions of our sisters and brothers to live in fear, it will be up to us to stand up for and defend the rights of those who will be harmed by the policies of his administration.
Sanctuary cities and states - places that protect undocumented immigrants from deportation - will be a central focus of our work. By working with grassroots organizations, we will ensure the existing protections granted by sanctuaries are kept in place while adopting those same protections in other cities and states across the country.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution right now, ahead of tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline, to help Our Revolution form the resistance movement against Trump?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/resistance-plan?refcode=em161231pm-full")
**Every contribution we receive will send a powerful message that our movement is prepared to fight back against Trump's destructive plans for our country.**
Thank you for adding yours before tonight's midnight deadline.
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: We could break a record
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7026/24c69fd9/fe23e9ef/18eec758/4073224638/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all&source=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all")
---

Peter,

At midnight, the chance to become an early 2017 EMILY's List member expires.

I've been watching all of the numbers come in this week -- we are SO CLOSE to having a record-breaking membership drive.

We need to break this record because the next few years could bring some of the biggest fights we've ever faced.

**[Donate by midnight to become a 2017 EMILY's List member-- if you donate $25 or more, we'll send you a surprise gift!](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7026/24c69fd9/fe23e9ef/18eec759/4073224638/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_MembershipGift?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+by+midnight+to+if+consinConsGroup&utm_campaign=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all&source=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all")**

We need to make some key budget decisions in the next few weeks. It's my job to make sure we have the resources to achieve our goals -- and we want to help elect as many pro-choice Democratic women as possible next cycle.

That's why it's so crucial to have strong membership numbers going into the new year.

**Time's running out: Donate to become an EMILY's List member. If you donate $25 or more, we'll even throw in a surprise gift:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/2017-Membership-Drive](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7026/24c69fd9/fe23e9ef/18eec75a/4073224638/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_MembershipGift?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg2017MembershipDr&utm_campaign=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all&source=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all")**

Thank you -- and happy New Year!

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7026/24c69fd9/fe23e9ef/18eec75b/4073224638/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_MembershipGift?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all&source=WPEFRX37N_digital_email_20161231_LastChance_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
